prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "10. Directors, Executive Officers and Corporate Governance" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 11. Executive Compensation".
Find where Item 10 ends: right before the "Item 11" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 10 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Our Code of Ethics is attached as an exhibit to this report. If we amend or grant a waiver of one or more of the provisions of our
Code of Ethics, we will satisfy the requirements under form 5 of Form 8-K regarding the disclosure of amendments to or waivers from
provisions of our Code of Ethics. The text of that waiver to our principal executive officer, principal financial officer and principal accounting officer by posting
a required information on our web site at the director services section.
